query_title: 6 Days to Air: The Making of South Park

recommendations.title: 13th
recommendations.overview: An in-depth look at the prison system in the United States and how it reveals the nation's history of racial inequality.

recommendations.title: South Park the Streaming Wars Part 2
recommendations.overview: A drought has brought the town of South Park to the brink of disaster.

recommendations.title: Harry Potter 20th Anniversary: Return to Hogwarts
recommendations.overview: An enchanting making-of story told through all-new in-depth interviews and cast conversations, inviting fans on a magical first-person journey through one of the most beloved film franchises of all time.
recommendations.director: Giorgio Testi, Casey Patterson, Eran Creevy, Joe Pearlman

recommendations.title: South Park: Post COVID: The Return of COVID
recommendations.overview: If Stan, Kyle and Cartman could just work together, they could go back in time to make sure Covid never happened. But traveling back to the past seems to be the easy answer until they meet Victor Chaos.

recommendations.title: South Park: Post COVID
recommendations.overview: What happened to the children who lived through the Pandemic? Stan, Kyle, Cartman and Kenny survived but will never be the same Post Covid.

recommendations.title: Interstellar: Nolan's Odyssey
recommendations.overview: A look behind the lens of Christopher Nolan's space epic.

recommendations.title: South Park (Not Suitable for Children)
recommendations.overview: After it's discovered that a teacher at South Park Elementary has an OnlyFans page, Randy is compelled to take a closer look at the seedy underbelly of the world of online influencers.

recommendations.title: The Secret
recommendations.overview: Interviews with leading authors, philosophers and scientists, with an in-depth discussion of the Law of Attraction. The audience is shown how they can learn and use 'The Secret' in their everyday lives.

recommendations.title: South Park: Imaginationland
recommendations.genres: Comedy, Animation, Fantasy, Adventure, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Some of the boys from South Park Elementary find themselves on a balloon ride to an imaginary land. Upon their arrival they're faced with an unimaginable threat.

recommendations.title: South Park the Streaming Wars
recommendations.overview: Cartman locks horns with his mom in a battle of wills while an epic conflict unfolds that threatens South Park’s very existence.
